case_title: NEW CHINA REALTY CORPORATION VS. ERIC FOSS et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEW CHINA REALTY CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOSS, ERIC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2888 FOLSOM STREET, UNIT 1-A SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94110, ** INCLUDING ANY//ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISE ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW CHINA REALTY CORPORATION SERVED OCT-27-2012, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT FOSS, ERIC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT FOSS, ERIC
DECLARATION OF DAVID P. WASSERMAN,ESQ. RE: COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW CHINA REALTY CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL $33.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW CHINA REALTY CORPORATION

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW CHINA REALTY CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT FOSS, ERIC DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FOSS, ERIC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW CHINA REALTY CORPORATION SERVED OCT-27-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FOSS, ERIC
